page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: BSCI454, BSCI455, NEUR405, or PSYC401.

BSC1I455 Neuroscience Laboratory (3 Credits)

Students will utilize neurophysiological techniques to examine fundamental principles of neurons and neural circuits. This course will reinforce content from prerequisite NEUR courses. Students will also strengthen skills in experimental design and scientific writing. Prerequisite: NEUR306 or BSCI353; and PHYS132.
